args.Details: [r IN results WHERE r.letter = $autostring_3 | r.messageCount][$autoint_4] AS messageCountA, [r IN results WHERE r.letter = $autostring_5 | r.messageCount][$autoint_6] AS messageCountB, person1.id AS `person1.id`
person1, collect({letter: paramLetter, messageCount: cm}) AS results
param.letter AS paramLetter, param.tag AS paramTagX, param.date AS paramDateX
[{letter: $autostring_0, tag: $tagA, date: $dateA}, {letter: $autostring_1, tag: $tagB, date: $dateB}] AS param
person1, count(DISTINCT message1) AS cm, count(DISTINCT person2) AS cp2
paramTagX, tag, paramDateX, message1, anon_0, person1, anon_1
